Yang Zuo Ê•äÁ•ö
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Zuo (Ê•äÁ•ö). Goes with Bei Yan and makes strong camp, suggests waiting for Sima Yi to retreat. Yang Zuo was affiliated with Gongsun Yuan and the Wei Kingdom.
